bird.name: Banded wattle-eye
bird.summary: The banded wattle-eye (Platysteira laticincta) is a species of bird in the family Platysteiridae. It is endemic to the Bamenda Highlands in…

relations.subject: Banded wattle-eye
relations.evidence: Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Banded wattle-eye
relations.evidence: |date=January 2019 |title=Occupancy and Conservation Prospects of Endemic Banded Wattle-Eye Platysteira laticincta in the Kilum–Ijim Community Forest, Northwestern Cameroon |journal=Tropical Conservation Science |volume=12 |page=194008291988288 |doi=10.1177/1940082919882884 |issn=1940-0829|doi-access=free }} It is threatened by habitat loss
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
